positive: A geometric, abstract representation of a forest through a stained-glass lens. The scene features interconnected, stylized foliage and luminous tree outlines rendered in deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and gold leaf accents. The style should be highly detailed line art with bold, contrasting color blocks, resembling Art Nouveau stained glass combined with modern vector illustration. Composition must be circular and symmetrical for central apparel placement. Focus on clean, sharp edges, strong negative space, and a high contrast aesthetic, optimized for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. Perfect silhouette definition. Full verticality and luminosity.
